candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A section appears separate from the selected COGS row, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales depreciation, so assigning it to COGS would risk misclassification.
Explicit operating depreciation component, but not identified as related to cost of goods sold; more likely part of a broader standalone depreciation block than a COGS-specific add-on.
Amortisation-like operating component shown separately, but not tied to COGS and therefore should not be added to COGS specifically.
Lease-related depreciation shown as a separate operating component, but not identified as COGS-specific.
Appears to be a balancing/helper row rather than a usable reported D&A expense line.

variables.notes: No depreciation/amortisation row is explicitly linked to cost of goods sold. The visible depreciation block is separate from COGS, but not bucket-tagged; conservatively do not allocate any of it to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: This is the apparent summary header for the standalone operating depreciation block, but it has no visible values. Because the summary row is not populated, use the component rows instead to capture separately disclosed operating D&A outside the selected XSGA component rows.

Separate operating depreciation line item outside the selected XSGA rows ('Salaries and other personnel costs' and 'Other operating expenses'), so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in those rows.
Separate amortisation/depreciation component in the same standalone operating depreciation block, outside the selected XSGA rows.
Separate lease-related depreciation component disclosed alongside other operating expenses, not as a sub-component of the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately.
Looks like a non-substantive balancing/helper row and should not be selected.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA components were only salaries/personnel and other operating expenses. The depreciation lines are presented as a separate same-level operating expense block above operating profit, so they are not assumed embedded in the selected XSGA rows. The summary row 'Depreciation' is blank, so the component rows are used instead.
